summary: A compact single-story bunker or fortified structure with a stepped pyramidal brick roof. The building features a sandstone base with yellow-tinted glass windows, surrounded by a concrete foundation platform. The structure sits in an excavated pit with dirt walls and is accessed via a sloped dirt ramp.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramidal roof

rebuild_hints: Excavate a rectangular pit approximately 10x10 blocks, 2-3 blocks deep
Build concrete foundation platform around the pit perimeter
Construct main walls from sandstone blocks, approximately 3 blocks tall
Add stone brick trim/frame around window openings
Install yellow-tinted glass windows in a 2x2 or 3x3 pattern on visible sides
Build stepped pyramidal roof using brick blocks in 3-4 ascending layers, each layer smaller than the last
Create dirt ramp leading into the pit for access
Ensure bilateral symmetry in window placement and roof stepping
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and floor plan not visible
Precise window dimensions and spacing uncertain from exterior views
Depth of excavation pit not precisely measurable
Whether structure extends below ground level or is fully above-ground with pit surround
Exact brick-to-stone ratio in roof construction
Presence of doors or other entrance mechanisms not clearly visible
